root_text.sn26.7:1.4: yo dhammasañcetanāya uppādo ṭhiti abhinibbatti pātubhāvo, dukkhasseso uppādo, rogānaṁ ṭhiti, jarāmaraṇassa pātubhāvo.
root_text.sn26.7:1.5: Yo ca kho, bhikkhave, rūpasañcetanāya nirodho …pe…
root_text.sn26.7:1.7: yo dhammasañcetanāya nirodho vūpasamo atthaṅgamo, dukkhasseso nirodho, rogānaṁ vūpasamo, jarāmaraṇassa atthaṅgamo”ti.

translation_text.sn26.7:1.2: “Mendicants, the arising of intentions regarding sights …
translation_text.sn26.7:1.4: intentions regarding ideas … is the manifestation of old age and death.
translation_text.sn26.7:1.5: The cessation of intentions regarding sights …
translation_text.sn26.7:1.7: intentions regarding ideas … is the disappearance of old age and death.”
